caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or an interview for "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap adorned with stickers, a matching green t-shirt with bold text, and headphones. The setting appears to be a casual yet professional environment, possibly a clothing store or a studio with a retail section, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are decorated with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the space. The man seems engaged in conversation, speaking into the microphone with a focused expression, suggesting he is discussing topics of interest or sharing insights related to the theme of the podcast.
